array.string:
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:$PATH" umask 077 LOG_DIR="$HOME/.openclaw/logs" LOG_FILE="$LOG_DIR/session-archive.log" SCRIPT="$HOME/.openclaw/scripts/archive_sessions.py" mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"
{ echo "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) [$(hostname -s)] session archive starting" if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then echo "ERROR: archive_sessions.py not found at $SCRIPT" exit 1 fi python3 "$SCRIPT" --agent-id main echo "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) [$(hostname -s)] session archive finished" } >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1
